T001.description: Removed hardcoded path /sessions/admiring-peaceful-gauss/prompt-guard from test_attack_vectors.py, replaced asyncio.get_event_loop().run_until_complete() with asyncio.run(), fixed prompt_guard.src.* imports in conftest.py and test_sanitiser.py

T002.description: Added HealthResponse dataclass to src/models/schemas.py with fields: status (str), detectors_loaded (int), uptime_seconds (float)

T003.description: Swapped if/elif order in _aggregate_scores so >= 4 check (1.25x boost) is evaluated before >= 3 (1.15x boost). Created test_engine_scoring.py with 4 dedicated tests.
